description: A quality issue has been reported by customer 'Azure Interior' regarding a broken 'Ergonomic Mesh Chair' from their recent shipment (Delivery Order WH/OUT/00099). Trace the specific Lot/Serial Number from this delivery back to its source to identify the vendor and original Purchase Order number. Create a report file named 'investigation_report.txt' on the Desktop containing the Defective Lot, Vendor, and Source PO.
